Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Medication Therapy Management Enrollment │ May 2024│ V 1.3 12 

CMR_RECEIVED_NUM 

LABEL: Number of Comprehensive Medication Reviews (CMRs) received 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the number of Comprehensive Medication Reviews (CMRs) with written 
summary in CMS standardized format the beneficiary received 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: 0–XX 

COMMENT: This variable is
